original_abstract: This paper addresses the distributed consensus protocol design problem for multi-agent systems with general linear dynamics and directed communication graphs. Existing works usually design consensus protocols using the smallest real part of the nonzero eigenvalues of the Laplacian matrix associated with the communication graph, which however is global information. In this paper, based on only the agent dynamics and the relative states of neighboring agents, a distributed adaptive consensus protocol is designed to achieve leader-follower consensus for any communication graph containing a directed spanning tree with the leader as the root node. The proposed adaptive protocol is independent of any global information of the communication graph and thereby is fully distributed. Extensions to the case with multiple leaders are further studied.
humanized_abstract: In this paper, we investigate the distributed consensus protocol design problem for multi-agent systems with general linear dynamics and directed communication graphs. The existing literature designs consensus protocol using the smallest real part of the nonzero eigenvalues of the Laplacian matrix of the communication graph which needs global information. In this paper, we design a distributed adaptive consensus protocol with leader-follower consensus in multi-agent systems with only agent dynamics and relative states of neighboring agents, spanning a directed communication graph that contains a directed spanning tree with the leader as the root node. The distributed adaptive consensus protocol can achieve leader-follower consensus without needing any global information of the communication graph. Hence, it is fully distributed. The extended results are also given for the case of multiple leaders.

The distributed adaptive consensus protocol can achieve leader-follower consensus without needing any global information of the communication graph. Hence, it is fully distributed. The extended results are also given for the case of multiple leaders.
